bamboohr_url.description: Builds individual /careers/{jobId}?source={param} URL when job.id is available; preserves source= query string; falls back to job.jobLink or source.source_url with individual_url_missing diagnostic

lcv_state_affiliate.description: Infers state, organization, and location from source URL domain for 21 LCV state affiliates; prepends state to title if missing; extracts city from URL path

pay_patterns.description: Added explicit matchers for expected base salary range, full salary range labels; handles $X-Y without second $; handles 'to' separator; added labels to PAY_CONTEXT_PATTERN

section_headings.description: Added Position Description, The Position, About the Role, Job Description, ^Description$ to PREFERRED_ROLE_SECTION_HEADINGS and HIGH_PRIORITY_SECTIONS. Priority: Position Description > Position Overview > Position Summary > The Position > Role Overview > About the Role > Job Description > Description > Responsibilities. extractCanonicalRoleSection now returns {text, heading} with which heading triggered extraction.

taleo_ats.description: Taleo ATS provider added across the system. fetchTaleoJobsForSource fetches the searchResults page, extracts viewRequisition links with rids, and creates pending records. Only viewRequisition URLs are used as job records. Login/search/landing pages are rejected.

job_authenticity_validator.description: Three-layer validation: (1) Title patterns reject login/search/benefits/procurement/landing page titles. (2) URL patterns reject candidateLogin, benefits, procurement, contact-us, proposal-request, careers landing pages, Taleo jobSearch. (3) Landing page detection rejects pages with careers/jobs titles but no job content signals (position description, responsibilities, qualifications, apply button, req ID).

false_job_page_classification.description: Pages classified as: login_page, careers_landing_page, benefits_page, procurement_page, search_page, navigation_page.
